prerequisites: A Lago account (Lago Cloud or a self-hosted Lago instance).
A Lago API key retrieved from your Lago account.
For self-hosted or non-US (e.g. EU) instances, the base API URL of your Lago server to set as api_url.

authMethods.name: API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: Lago authenticates API requests with your API key sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer $API_KEY). Provide this key in the connector's required api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Retrieve your Lago API key
setupSteps.body: Retrieve your API key from your Lago account. Copy it for use in the connector.

setupSteps.title: Set the api_key field
setupSteps.body: Enter the API key into the connector's required api_key field. Lago sends it as a Bearer token in the Authorization header on every request.

setupSteps.title: Set the api_url if not using Lago Cloud US
setupSteps.body: The connector defaults to the Lago Cloud US endpoint at https://api.getlago.com. If you self-host Lago or use a different server region, set the optional api_url field to your instance URL (for example https://api.eu.getlago.com for the EU region).
